# FortifyLearn / Cy-Sec

> Cy-Sec is a UK-based cybersecurity consultancy and training brand. FortifyLearn is the company's CompTIA prep platform, built around live CLI terminal labs for Performance-Based Questions (PBQs) and a full Exam Engine with Study Mode and timed Exam Mode. Built and maintained by Gaz Cocklin, a Crown Security Architect (CISSP-ISSAP, CISM, CRISC, CGEIT, CCSP).

## CompTIA prep platform — FortifyLearn

- [FortifyLearn — CompTIA prep platform](/fortifylearn): Two engines, one platform. PBQ Engine for live CLI, SIEM and visual-tool simulations; Exam Engine for MCQ practice and timed mock exams. Free taster labs, one-time purchase, lifetime access. Network+, Security+, CySA+, A+ Core 1 and A+ Core 2.
- [CompTIA Network+ N10-009 Practice Labs](/comptia-network-plus-labs): 10 hands-on Network+ N10-009 simulation labs across 2 tiers (Foundation Labs £19.99, Advanced Labs £19.99, or Complete Labs £32.99). Cisco IOS-style CLI environments, FL-NETSIM network topology simulator, NETCAP packet analyser, and NETPULSE multi-site NMS. Two free taster labs available without payment.
- [CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 Practice Labs](/comptia-security-plus-labs): 10 hands-on Security+ SY0-701 simulation labs across 2 tiers. Linux-style CLI, FORTIGUARD firewall policy auditor, MFA enforcement and bastion-host hardening, full PKI rotation after CA compromise. Two free taster labs available.
- [CompTIA CySA+ CS0-003 Practice Labs](/comptia-cysa-plus-labs): 10 hands-on CySA+ CS0-003 simulation labs across 2 tiers. Arclight SIEM alert triage, NETSCAN PRO vulnerability scanner, web shell investigation, credential harvesting and ransomware staging response, malicious cron persistence removal — built around real SOC analyst workflows.
- [CompTIA A+ Core 1 220-1201 Practice Labs](/comptia-aplus-core1-labs): CompTIA A+ Core 1 (exam code 220-1201) practice labs covering mobile devices, networking, hardware, virtualisation and cloud, and hardware/network troubleshooting. One free taster lab live now (laptop hardware health triage); full paid packs in development.
- [CompTIA A+ Core 2 220-1202 Practice Labs](/comptia-aplus-core2-labs): CompTIA A+ Core 2 (exam code 220-1202) practice labs covering operating systems, security, software troubleshooting and operational procedures. One free taster lab live now (suspicious process triage and Defender quarantine); full paid packs in development.
- [FortifyLearn Store](/store): Browse and buy FortifyLearn products — Foundation Labs (£19.99), Advanced Labs (£19.99), Complete Labs (£32.99 — saves £6.99), Exam Engine (£24.99), and Exam Prep Bundle (£39.99 — saves £24.98). Secure Stripe checkout, lifetime access, no subscription.

## Cornerstone explainers

- [What is a CompTIA PBQ? — Performance-Based Questions explained](/what-is-a-comptia-pbq): A practitioner's guide to CompTIA Performance-Based Questions (PBQs) — what they are, how they're scored, why they're harder than multiple choice, and how to prepare. Covers Network+, Security+, CySA+ and A+. Written by Gaz Cocklin (Crown Security Architect, ex-Firebrand instructor).

## Cy-Sec consultancy and platforms

- [Cy-Sec — Cybersecurity Leadership, Compliance & Training](/): vCISO leadership, DORA and NIS2 compliance sprints, CompTIA-aligned training, and the FortifyOne compliance platform. UK-based. One trusted partner for cybersecurity leadership, compliance and learning.
- [FortifyOne GRC Platform](/fortify-one): ISO 27001, DORA and NIS2 compliance platform with vendor risk management for UK small and mid-sized businesses. Currently in development.
- [Virtual CISO Service UK](/vciso): Dedicated Virtual CISO (vCISO) service for UK SMBs. ISO 27001, DORA, NIS2 compliance support, FortifyOne platform included. Bronze tier from £995/month, Silver £2,250/month, Gold £4,500/month.
- [DORA Compliance Sprint](/dora-compliance): Accelerated path to Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) compliance for UK financial services firms in scope.
- [NIS2 Compliance for UK & EU Businesses](/nis2-compliance): NIS2 readiness reviews, gap analysis, and supply chain security for UK and EU firms in scope of the directive.
- [Pricing Plans](/pricing): Pricing for vCISO services, training, and the FortifyOne platform.
- [Contact Us](/contact): Contact the Cy-Sec team about vCISO, compliance, training, or FortifyLearn.

## Training delivery

- [CompTIA Professional Certifications](/training/comptia-certifications): Self-study, instructor-led, and hybrid CompTIA prep — Network+, Security+, CySA+, A+ Core 1 and A+ Core 2.
- [CertNexus Professional Certifications](/training/certnexus-certifications): CertNexus certifications including CyberSec First Responder (CFR) and CyberSAFE.
- [Self-Study CompTIA Modules](/training/self-study): Self-paced CompTIA modules for Network+, Security+, CySA+ and A+.
- [Hybrid Courses](/training/hybrid): Hybrid delivery combining self-study and instructor-led training.
- [Instructor-Led Training](/training/instructor-led): Live instructor-led CompTIA training delivery.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Cy-Sec collects, uses and protects user data — UK GDPR compliant.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms of Service for cy-sec.co.uk and FortifyLearn.
